name: Mornye Basic Attack
notes: High-level policy action; resolves in characters/mornye.py.

name: Mornye Heavy Attack
notes: High-level policy action; resolves to normal Heavy, Geopotential Shift, or Inversion.

name: Mornye Resonance Skill
notes: High-level policy action; baseline resolves to Expectation Error by default, may force Optimal Solution only in explicit always_success GP mode, and WFO resolves to Distributed Array.

name: Mornye Resonance Liberation
notes: High-level policy action; resolves to Critical Protocol.

name: Mornye Skill Expectation Error
notes: Baseline Resonance Skill / GP judgment action. Full GP/counter success detection is not modeled; this action does not automatically apply Optimal Solution damage or resources.

name: Mornye Skill Optimal Solution
notes: Workbook \u83ab\u5b81 frame rows 4141-4142 and skill row 2665. Optimal Solution is treated as a GP/counter success follow-up and is applied only by explicit always_success diagnostics or a future modeled GP success trigger.
scaling_stat_note: Mornye damage is DEF-scaling per user-provided skill description; project should archive source screenshot or text before final validation.
